messages.message:
Based on the retrieved context, RAG stands for **Retrieval-Augmented Generation**. 

It is a technology leveraged by ResearchMind AI to make document interaction faster, smarter, and more intuitive. It works by retrieving relevant information from uploaded documents before generating accurate, context-aware answers grounded in the user's own data. In the project's technology stack, LangChain is used to implement RAG.
